disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Massive urine output for about a week despite drinking constantly
trigger_question_examples: How much has he been passing?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's been going to the toilet non-stop for about a week, passing huge amounts, even though he drinks jug after jug of water.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Strong specific craving for ice-cold water
trigger_question_examples: Does he prefer any particular kind of drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He only wants ice-cold water — he keeps asking for it freezing, nothing else will do.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fluids were restricted a few hours ago, and he then rapidly became confused and drowsy
trigger_question_examples: What changed just before he became confused?
Did anything happen today before he got worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I tried to stop him drinking so much earlier to cut down the endless toilet trips, and soon after that he went downhill fast — got confused and could barely stay awake.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute altered mental status — confused, talking nonsense, barely rousable
trigger_question_examples: Is he awake and making sense?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's talking nonsense and I can barely keep him awake — he's not himself at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Urine appears completely clear and colourless like water
trigger_question_examples: What does his urine look like?
Is his urine dark or pale?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's completely clear, colourless — it looks just like plain water.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Waking many times overnight to pass urine with resulting daytime exhaustion
trigger_question_examples: Is this happening at night too?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's up all night going to the toilet, so he's been shattered during the day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No known lithium use and no recent head injury (aetiology screen)
trigger_question_examples: Does he take any regular medicines, like lithium?
Has he had any recent head injury or knock to the head?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, he doesn't take lithium or any regular tablets that I know of, and he hasn't hit his head.
